title: Reach Melve
description: Proceed from Borderwatch to Melve as part of early story route.
notes: Own route summary based on public quest walkthrough.

title: Travel toward Vernworth
description: Continue from Melve toward Vernworth with the capital route.
notes: Own route summary based on public quest walkthrough.

title: Meet Brant
description: Use the Vernworth hub context to unlock early city quests.

title: Start Vocation Frustration
description: Talk to Klaus at the Vernworth Vocation Guild.

title: Ask Roderick
description: Talk to Roderick at his smithy for the weapon clue.

title: Recover the weapons
description: Enter Trevo Mine and recover the greatsword and archistaff.

title: Return to Klaus
description: Return the recovered weapons to Klaus.

title: Trevo Mine overlap
description: Trevo Mine can overlap with early monster-clearing route planning.
notes: Only use if accepted; not mandatory for fast OP route.

title: Return to Melve
description: Return to Melve after early Brant quest progress to trigger the event.

title: Talk to Sigurd
description: After repelling the dragon, talk to Sigurd for Mystic Spearhand.

title: Help Gautstafr
description: Meet Gautstafr near Windwalker's Home and begin the escort chain.

title: Meet Cliodhna
description: Complete the escort chain and receive Magick Archer unlock from Cliodhna.

title: Speak to Lamond
description: Find Lamond near Volcanic Island Camp hot springs.

title: Give Newt Liqueur
description: Give Lamond the required Newt Liqueur to unlock Warfarer.

title: Talk to Luz
description: Talk to Luz at Reverent Shrine for the Trickster route.

title: Visit Nameless Village
description: Travel to Nameless Village during Brant investigation route.
